name: Generate quality commit messages
query: Create a commit for the changes I made to add email validation to the authentication system
setup_commands: # Assume changes are staged in auth/validator.go
expected_behavior: Checks README.md and CONTRIBUTING.md for commit message conventions
If validation fails, revises and re-validates
Uses pipe format: echo 'message' | stackit create
feat(auth): add email validation to user registration
Prevents invalid email addresses from being registered.
Only proceeds when message meets quality standards
quality_indicators: Follows project conventions (if documented in README.md/CONTRIBUTING.md)
Description is specific (not generic like 'update code')
No placeholder text or TODO markers
anti_patterns: Generic messages like 'update file' or 'fix bug'
No explanation of why change was made
Uses 'git commit' directly instead of stackit
